tickets.title: US001: Student barcode scanning
tickets.description:
As a student, I want to be able to scan my items' barcode to type in the ISBN and Title, so that I can conveniently sell an item.

Acceptance criteria: 
1. The app must retrieve correct information from the barcode.
2. The barcode to item's details transfer must happen in < 3 seconds.

analysis.ambiguity1: "Only people with a valid .edu email address can create an account" is unclear. There are different formats for student email address (name.surname.edu, namesurname.edu, surname.edu.vn,...).
analysis.ambiguity2: "I want to be able to auction items" is ambigious. The requirement doesn't provide clear details of the auction (is there limit to the price, can users limit how long an auction should last,...).
analysis.conflictSolution: The conflict between University Legal Team and Student Union President: "The university cannot handle any money.", but "Student Union President said they want to take a 2% transaction fee to fund club activities.". This solution can be solved by making the students directly pay the 2% transaction to the club first before they can sell or auction items.
analysis.nfr1: Security: Account can only be created if there is at least a ".edu" in their email.
analysis.nfr2: Security: Users must choose a safe zone before they can chat.
analysis.nfr3: Performance: The app must get correct item's ISBN and Title from the barcode.
